title: sutera canescens
intro: Sutera canescens, also known as Sutera, is a flowering plant in the balsam family (Pentaphragmataceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Sutera canescens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Sutera canescens is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
